title: Taylor
compiled_truth: Taylor is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-06-04 to 2002-02-14),  Taylor sent 505 and received 1367 emails, totalling 1872 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (57), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (43), [N  Gray](people/n-gray) (42), [Holly Keiser](people/holly-keiser) (39), [Mary Cook](people/mary-cook) (36). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, contacts, deleted_items, ethics_ljm_notre_dame, inbox, ring_trades.
